name: Latvian Socialist Soviet Republic (1918–1920)
description: A plain red field with the gold initials 'LSPR' (Latvijas Sociālistiskā Padomju Republika) inscribed in the upper hoist.
history: The flag of the short-lived Latvian Socialist Soviet Republic of Pēteris Stučka, proclaimed 17 December 1918 with Bolshevik backing during the Latvian War of Independence and dissolved in January 1920. It was a red banner bearing the republic's gold initials, the first Soviet Latvian flag.

features.symbolism: the name of the Latvian Socialist Soviet Republic
